testCases.title: Cart Merge - Currency Mismatch
testCases.expected: After guest adds item in USD and signs in as EUR-default user, cart merges and all prices display in EUR (customer default currency). Currency header switches to EUR.
testCases.actual: PASS. Currency header switched to EUR immediately after sign-in. Cart page confirmed: line item price €10,000.00 (EUR), line total €7,600.00 (EUR with discount), order summary subtotal €10,000.00, total €8,208.00. All in EUR. Currency context applied correctly on merge. No USD prices leaked into merged cart.
consoleErrors: Failed to load resource: net::ERR_NAME_NOT_RESOLVED @ https://starmarket-platform.demo.govirto.com/cms-content/assets/catalog/5aa50/OCE-26145626/becks_510_m_md.jpg (unrelated broken image asset from different demo env)

Failed to load resource: net::ERR_NAME_NOT_RESOLVED @ https://starmarket-platform.demo.govirto.com/cms-content/assets/catalog/5aa50/OCE-26145626/becks_510_m.jpg (unrelated broken image asset from different demo env)
testCases.notes: All GraphQL requests returned HTTP 200. Console errors are DNS failures for a cross-origin image URL from starmarket-platform.demo.govirto.com — unrelated to cart/merge behavior, pre-existing catalog data issue. EUR user 'Mango-larch' (larch9900.mango@mail.com) authenticated successfully. Product '3D Decompression Sanrio Series Mini Notebook' has an EUR price list entry (€10,000.00). EUR pricing for guest-added product was recalculated correctly on merge per BL-CART-004. Prior FAIL was reproduced under the OLD EUR user; with the updated EUR user, EUR context applies correctly.
